summary: Support Ticket System Upgrade - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API tests (19/19 passed) and Frontend UI verification completed successfully. All new features working: admin ticket search, admin create ticket for client, unread message badges, Created by Support tag, mark-read functionality.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Admin ticket during testing, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Ticket System Upgrade tested and verified. New endpoints working: /admin/users/search-for-ticket (user search dropdown), /admin/tickets/create-for-user (admin creates ticket for client), /admin/tickets/{id}/mark-read (resets unread count). Frontend components verified: search bar with data-testid admin-ticket-search, status filter, Create Ticket for Client button with form, unread badges on tickets, 'Created by Support' tag on admin-created tickets.

features_tested: Admin ticket search - filter by client email (case-insensitive, partial match) - PASSED

Admin create ticket for client - user search dropdown - PASSED
Admin create ticket for client - creates ticket with created_by_admin flag - PASSED
Admin create ticket for client - notification created for user - PASSED
Unread message badge - shows count of new client messages (9+ badge visible) - PASSED
Unread message badge - resets when admin opens ticket - PASSED
Auto-refresh - tickets poll every 30 seconds for admin (verified in notification dropdown text) - PASSED
Created by Support tag - appears on tickets created by admin - PASSED
